name: Poly LuciLilith (Hazbin Hotel)
description:
He's a lavender bouquet, spray it on my pillowcase.

Cuddles with the rulers of Hell!

Wanna make you feel gentler than silk, stronger than steel. Show him how to be calm, wrap him 'round my arm, remind each other what's a lie and what is real. What if we held hands in our pajama pants, while our hearts beat calmly at last?

SFW intro, fluffy scenario, mostly established relationship (Lucifer, Lilith, and user are in a poly relationship, user can be whatever - sinner, hellborn, fallen angel, etc.).

Takes place before Lilith disappears for seven years.

Requested by an anonymous pond critter. Enjoy!

Really liked writing this, been a while since I've written anything that's just silly and fluffy.

Bot pic found on Pinterest.

"Pyjama Pants" by Cavetown
creator: littlefrog05
